data.title: AI is transforming the market, but it's difficult to gauge its impact accurately amid conflicting reports on job loss and growth.
data.description: Conflicting reports highlight the impact of artificial intelligence on employment. While some data indicate job losses due to AI, other sources present a different perspective. This disparity in findings makes it challenging to ascertain the true effects of AI on the job market. In numbers, studies show that AI has contributed to the displacement of X amount of jobs, particularly in industries like manufacturing and customer service. Conversely, Y number of jobs have been created or enhanced by AI, with growth seen in sectors such as technology and healthcare. This disparity creates a complex and nuanced landscape when determining the overall impact of AI on employment.
JAPAN, SAUDI AGREE SAFE HORMUZ PASSAGE WITH NO EXTRA COSTS IS KEY

data.title: Dubai approves 50 crypto firms under VARA, with 39 fully operational as of 2025, showing market growth.
data.description: The Virtual Asset Regulatory Authority (VARA) in Dubai has recently granted licenses to its 50th cryptocurrency firm. However, by the end of 2025, only 39 Virtual Asset Service Providers (VASPs) were operating fully within the regulatory framework of the emirate. This indicates steady growth in Dubai's regulated cryptocurrency market as more firms are expected to become fully operational in the near future.

data.title: HiBy Products Receive Multiple Honors at VGP 2026 SUMMER
data.description: In Lewes, Delaware on July 2, 2026, HiBy and HiBy Digital emerged as major winners at Japan's renowned VGP 2026 SUMMER audio-visual awards. The brands clinched the Selection Award along with numerous Gold Awards, as well as a remarkable range of product accolades. This recent triumph underscores their success in the industry and highlights the excellence of their latest product lineup.

data.title: Metaplanet acquires 2,823 BTC, increasing its Bitcoin holdings over 43,000, with $10.9 million revenue. Acquisition cost at $106,500 per BTC.
data.description: During the second quarter, Metaplanet purchased a total of 2,823 Bitcoin, bringing down its average acquisition cost to $106,500 per BTC. The company reported generating $10.9 million in revenue from its income generation strategy during the same period.
Japan and Saudi Arabia's foreign ministers held a call on Thursday

data.title: Verisk Estimates Economic Losses From June 24 Venezuela Earthquake Sequence Will Exceed USD 10 Billion
data.description: The most powerful earthquake to hit Venezuela since 1900 has resulted in extensive destruction across northern Venezuela. This event has brought attention to the difficulties faced within the country's insurance sector. The earthquake, believed to be the strongest in over a century, has caused significant damage to buildings and infrastructure. The seismic event has underscored the vulnerability of the region and raised concerns about the ability of the insurance market to adequately cover such catastrophes. This natural disaster has left many residents struggling to recover, with reports indicating that thousands have been affected and numerous properties have been severely impacted. The repercussions of this earthquake are likely to be felt for a long time, further emphasizing the need for resilience and preparedness in the face of such incidents.

data.title: iQIYI Announces Change in Executive Leadership
data.description: On July 2, 2026, iQIYI, Inc. (Nasdaq: IQ), a prominent online entertainment video services provider in China, revealed the hiring of Mr. Ying Tian as the new Chief Financial Officer. This appointment came into effect immediately. The former Interim Chief Financial Officer, Ms. Ying Zeng, will now return to her previous position as the Senior Vice President of Finance.

data.title: Jaguar's shift to all-electric includes unveiling a new flagship this fall for deliveries next year, drawing mixed feedback.
data.description: A renowned British car manufacturer is transitioning entirely to electric vehicles, with the launch of its new flagship model set for this autumn and deliveries scheduled for the following year. The bold move to go all-electric is unique but carries significant risks, leading to criticism from influential figures in the industry.

data.title: Daniel Hilkert Takes on Additional Role as Chief Product Officer at zvoove Group
data.description: On July 2, 2026, in Munich, zvoove, a top software and AI solution company for temporary staffing, private security, and cleaning sectors, revealed that Daniel Hilkert, Chief Commercial Officer, will now also serve as Chief Product Officer.

data.title: Award-Winning Author, Luz Mack, Launches The Missing Book Podcast, Exploring the Power of Representation, Literacy and the People Behind the Books
data.description: In an exciting development, a fresh podcast, led by cultural storyteller and filmmaker Luz Maria Mack, has been launched. The podcast will showcase engaging discussions with a variety of influential figures such as authors, educators, advocates, and artists who are making significant contributions to literature and culture. The initiative, based in New York, was officially announced on July 2, 2026. This project aims to shed light on the creative minds behind compelling stories that have resonated with a wide audience, with the potential to become bestsellers in the future.

data.title: GENMA Commissions Floating Transhipment System for West African Mineral Exports
data.description: In Boffa Prefecture, Guinea, on July 2, 2026, GENMA, a top company in marine material handling solutions, revealed the completion of its newest floating transhipment system. This system will soon be sent to West Africa to aid in the export of minerals.

data.title: OpenAI considers offering 5% stake to US government during Trump's administration, amid AI model oversight.
data.description: During initial discussions in the early years of the Trump administration, OpenAI has reportedly considered offering the US government a five percent ownership stake. These talks come as Washington increases its scrutiny and regulation of artificial intelligence models.

data.title: Stellar Resources Delivers 64% Increase in Severn Tin Resource, Cementing Heemskirk as Australia's Highest-Grade Undeveloped Tin Project
data.description: A substantial increase of 64% has been reported in the tin resource at the Severn Mine by Stellar Resources. This boost has solidified the Heemskirk Project's status as Australia's most noteworthy undeveloped tin project in terms of grade.
